title: Thank You, Jeeves!
writer: Joseph Hoffman, Stephen Gross, P.G. Wodehouse
actors: Arthur Treacher, Virginia Field, David Niven
plot: Erudite manservant Jeeves hopes to keep his frivolous employer Bertie out of new harrowing adventures, but a damsel in distress, carrying half of some mysterious plans, intrudes on their London flat one rainy night. Bertie follows...
